src/main/java/com/example/AUI_Labs/AuiLa.general_idea: Removed hardcoded employee data creation and stream processing logic from the main method to clean up the application entry point.
src/main/java/com/example/AUI_Labs/AuiLa.human_impl: Deleted blocks creating EmployeeRole/Employee instances and performing forEach/stream operations.

src/main/java/com/example/AUI_Labs/AuiLa.general_idea: Removed imports for java.util and java.util.stream.Collectors that are no longer used after removing the lab code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
Add explicit dependency for Logback Core library.
Add explicit dependency for Logback Classic library.
Add Spring Boot Starter Data JPA dependency for database access.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for runtime use.
Rename the project artifact and name from AUI_Labs to demo.
Reformat XML indentation from tabs to spaces for consistency.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Configure the JDBC URL for an in-memory H2 database.
Specify the H2 JDBC driver class name.
Set the database username for H2.
Set the database password for H2 (empty).
Configure Hibernate to use the H2 dialect.
Set Hibernate DDL auto strategy to create-drop.
Enable the H2 web console for database inspection.
